introduction.title: Let's get to know your business! 😊
introduction.subtitle: Before we get started, there are a couple of things you should know.

beneficial-owner.title: You need to be a beneficial owner to verify your business.
beneficial-owner.description: A beneficial owner is anyone who owns at least 25% of the business.

bo-kyc.title: We need to verify your identity, as a beneficial owner.
bo-kyc.description: Otherwise we can't successfully verify your business.

basic-data.title: Basic data
basic-data.subtitle: We need some information about your business.

business-name.label: Business name
business-name.error: Business name cannot be empty or is invalid

errors.required: EIN cannot be empty or is invalid
errors.pattern: EIN has to be in the format 12-3456789

errors.required: Website cannot be empty or is invalid

business-address.title: What's your registered business address?
business-address.subtitle: For verification purposes, we only need the registered business address.

beneficial-owners.title: Who are the beneficial owners?
beneficial-owners.subtitle: List all individuals who own at least 25% of the business.

first-name.label: First name
first-name.error: First name cannot be empty or is invalid

last-name.label: Last name
last-name.error: Last name cannot be empty or is invalid

email.label: Email
email.hint: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your email address.

errors.pattern: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your email address.

errors.required: Ownership stake cannot be empty or is invalid
errors.min: Only list individuals who own at least 25% of the business
errors.max: Ownership stake cannot be larger than 100%

ownership-stake-total.title: Ownership stake total exceeds 100%
ownership-stake-total.description: Please verify each beneficial owner's ownership stake. The sum can't exceed 100%.

summary.title: Confirm your business data
summary.subtitle: Please make sure that your business data is accurate and there are no typos before continuing.

sync-data-error.title: An error occurred
sync-data-error.description: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix the inputs and try again.
